item.description:
Bug fixes

  • Fixed a critical bug where pressing Send → Undo → Send during the unsend countdown could deliver a blank email. The recipient appeared to send, but the body was empty on arrival (BOX-15).

Recent improvements (since 1.0.16)

  • 1.0.18: Sender names with nested quoted display names no longer show stray backslashes in the thread view.
  • 1.0.17: Normal Mail now silently checks for updates on every launch (when "Automatically check for updates" is enabled in Settings), instead of waiting up to 24 hours.
  • 1.0.17: ⌘1 jumps to your Inbox and scrolls both the sidebar and message list to the top. It no longer recenters the main window.

Bug fixes

  • Fixed sender names showing with stray backslashes in the thread view when the From header contained nested quoted display names (BOX-14).

What's new

  • Normal Mail now silently checks for updates every time you launch the app (when "Automatically check for updates" is on in Settings), so you'll see new versions sooner instead of waiting for Sparkle's 24-hour timer.
  • ⌘1 now scrolls both the sidebar and the message list back to the top, in addition to selecting your Inbox.

Bug fixes

  • ⌘1 no longer recenters the main window. Your window position is preserved when navigating to your Inbox.
